questions.prompt: Choose the organelle where aerobic respiration occurs in a plant cell.
Explain how water moves into a root hair cell by osmosis.
questions.topicHint: water movement across a partially permeable membrane
markSchemeBullets: water moves from higher water potential in the soil to lower water potential in the root hair cell
movement is through a partially permeable membrane
credit net movement of water into the cell
allow dilute to concentrated if the direction is correct

questions.prompt: Compare mitosis with meiosis in terms of chromosome number and genetic variation.
markSchemeBullets: mitosis keeps the chromosome number the same

questions.topicHint: distinguishing community from population and ecosystem
markSchemeBullets: all the populations of different species living together in a habitat
do not credit answers that describe only one species or only the habitat
